panels.title: Current Cost / Analysis (Live)
panels.description: Live cost per trace calculated from actual token usage via Phoenix. Formula: (prompt_tokens * $2.50 + completion_tokens * $10.00) / 1M / trace_count.

panels.title: V1 Cost Baseline
panels.description: Historical cost per analysis before QE tooling and token optimisation. Documented project baseline.

panels.title: Latency Reduction vs V1 (Live)
panels.description: Percentage time reduction vs V1 baseline (4 hr = 14400s). Calculated from live phoenix_latency_ms_p50.

panels.title: Phoenix API Status (Live)
panels.description: Phoenix API reachability. 1 = up, 0 = down. Source: phoenix_up.
